results.definition_en: An outer piece of clothing, often long, worn for warm.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 外套、大衣;多為長款、可保暖的外穿衣物。
results.example_en: Wear your coat in the cold.

results.definition_en: The part of a shirt or coat that goes round the neck.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 衣領;圍繞頸部的衣物部分。
results.example_en: Turn up your collar to keep warm.

results.definition_en: A flat piece with teeth, used to put the hair in order.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 梳子;帶齒的扁片，用以梳理頭髮。
results.example_en: She put a comb in her hair.
results.example_zh_tw: 她在頭髮上插了把梳子。

results.definition_en: A long thin thing made of twisted threads, used to keep things together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 繩、細繩;以纖維捻成、用以綁束的細長物。
results.example_en: Tie the parcel with a cord.

results.definition_en: A big farm animal kept for its milk or meat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 牛、母牛;可產乳或供肉食的大型農場動物。
results.example_en: The cow gives us fresh milk.
results.example_zh_tw: 牛供應我們新鮮的牛奶。

results.definition_en: A small round container with a handle, used to drink from.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 杯子;圓形帶把、用於飲用的容器。
results.example_en: Pour the tea into the cup.

results.definition_en: A piece of cloth hung at a window or door.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 窗簾、簾幕;掛於窗戶或門口的布。
results.example_en: Pull the curtain closed at night.

results.definition_en: A soft thing filled inside, used to sit or rest on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 墊子、坐墊;內填軟物、可坐或可靠之物。
results.example_en: Sit on the cushion for comfort.

results.definition_en: A common animal that is kept by people as a pet or to keep things safe.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 狗;常作寵物或看家的動物。
results.example_en: The dog runs in the garden.

results.definition_en: A flat thing that opens and shuts at the way into a building or room.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 門;建築或房間入口處可開合的扁平結構。
results.example_en: Shut the door behind you.

results.definition_en: A pipe or hole for taking dirty water away.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 排水管、水溝;用以排走污水之管或孔。
results.example_en: The drain is full of leaves.

results.definition_en: A box-like part of a piece of furniture that slides in and out.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 抽屜;家具中可推拉的方形儲物部分。
results.example_en: The papers are in the top drawer.
results.example_zh_tw: 文件在最上層的抽屜裡。

results.definition_en: A piece of clothing for a woman or girl, that covers the body and goes down to the legs.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 洋裝、連身裙;女性穿著、覆蓋上身至下肢的衣物。
results.example_en: She wears a long blue dress.
results.example_zh_tw: 她穿著一件藍色長洋裝。

results.definition_en: A very small round amount of liquid.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 一滴;液體的極小圓形分量。
results.example_en: A drop of rain fell on her face.

results.definition_en: The part of the head used to hear with.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 耳朵;頭部用以聆聽之器官。
results.example_en: The dog has long, soft ears.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻狗有著又長又軟的耳朵。

results.definition_en: A round or oval thing laid by a bird, with a soft inside used as food.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 蛋;鳥所產的圓或卵形物，內部可食。
results.example_en: I have an egg for breakfast.

results.definition_en: A machine that gives power to make a thing move.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 引擎、發動機;提供動力使物運轉的機器。
results.example_en: The car has a new engine.

results.definition_en: The part of the head used to see with.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 眼睛;頭部用以視物之器官。
results.example_en: She has bright blue eyes.
results.example_zh_tw: 她有一雙明亮的藍眼睛。

results.definition_en: The front part of the head, from the chin to the hair.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 臉、面孔;頭部正面，自下巴至髮際。
results.example_en: Wash your face every morning.

results.definition_en: A piece of land used to grow food or keep animals.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 農場;用以耕作或畜養的土地。
results.example_en: My uncle has a small farm.

results.definition_en: One of the soft light things that cover a bird's body.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 羽毛;覆蓋鳥身的輕軟物。
results.example_en: A white feather fell from the bird.
results.example_zh_tw: 鳥身上掉下一片白色羽毛。

results.definition_en: One of the five thin parts at the end of each hand.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 手指;手末端的五根細長部分之一。
results.example_en: She put her finger to her lips.

results.definition_en: A cold-blooded animal that lives in water and breathes through gills.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 魚;生活於水中、以鰓呼吸的冷血動物。
results.example_en: I caught a big fish in the river.
results.example_zh_tw: 我在河裡釣到一條大魚。

results.definition_en: A piece of coloured cloth on a pole, often as a sign of a country.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 旗幟;繫於桿上的彩色布料，常作國家象徵。
results.example_en: The flag waved in the wind.

results.definition_en: The flat part at the bottom of a room, on which one walks.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 地板;房間底部供人行走的平面。
results.example_en: Sweep the floor every day.
